Pleurotus Ferulae Mycelium Extract is the extract of the mycelium of the mushroom Pleurotus ferulae.

s-HIV-1 Oligopeptide-3 SP is a single chain protein containing 39 amino acids. It is synthetically produced based on the sequence for Gag Polyprotein which is found in the pathogenic virus, Human Immunodeficiency Virus-1 (HIV-1). HIV-1 contains 500 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 amino acids.

rh-Polypeptide-125 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene which is isolated from a human cell and codes for Platelet-Derived Growth Factor C is used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 345 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Ganoderma Lucidum Mycelium Extract is the extract of the mycelium of the mushroom Ganoderma lucidum.
Calophyllum Inophyllum Seedcake Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground seedcake of Calophyllum inophyllum.

Polyacrylate-55 is formed by reacting Methyl Methacrylate, Ethyl Acrylate, Butyl Methacrylate, Isobutyl Methacrylate, t-Butyl Methacrylate, Ethylhexyl Acrylate and Ethylhexyl Methacrylate.

Bis-HEMA Poly(1,4-Butanediol)-14 Neopentyl Glycol/IPDI Copolymer is a urethane polymer formed by the reaction of Poly(1,4-Butanediol)-14, Neopentyl Glycol and Isophorone Diisocyanate. The polymer is end-capped with HEMA.

Bis-HPMA Poly(1,4-Butanediol Adipate)/IPDI Copolymer is a urethane polymer formed by a multi-step process. First, a prepolymer is made by reacting 1,4-Butanediol and Adipic Acid, which is subsequently reacted with Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI). The resulting polymer is end-capped with Hydroxypropyl Methacrylate (HPMA).

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: NICOTIANA BENTHAMIANA R-(S-SOLITARY BEE OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 PENTAPEPTIDE-75 S-PROPIONIBACTERIUM PHAGE P9.1 POLYPEPTIDE-1)
chemicalDescription: Nicotiana Benthamiana r-(s-Solitary Bee Oligopeptide-1 Pentapeptide-75 s-Propionibacterium Phage P9.1 Polypeptide-1) is a single chain recombinant peptide produced by Nicotiana benthamiana after transformation with either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of the synthetic gene into its DNA). The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from s-Solitary Bee Oligopeptide-1, Pentapeptide-75, and s-Propionibacterium Phage P9.1 Polypeptide-1. The fusion peptide contains 317 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids
inciName: NICOTIANA BENTHAMIANA R-(S-SOLITARY BEE OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 PENTAPEPTIDE-75 S-PROPIONIBACTERIUM PHAGE P9.1 POLYPEPTIDE-1)

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SR-(OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-117 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-95 PENTAPEPTIDE-63 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-6 NONAPEPTIDE-43 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-6) DIMER
chemicalName: sr-(Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-117 sh-Polypeptide-94 sh-Polypeptide-95 Pentapeptide-63 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-6 Nonapeptide-43 sh-Polypeptide-6) Dimer
chemicalDescription: This peptide is a dimer linked by a disulfide bridge between the cysteines, consisting of a single chain synthetic fusion peptide produced by fermentation in Chinese hamster ovary cells (CHO). The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from Oligopeptide-163, sh-Polypeptide-117, sh-Polypeptide-94, sh-Polypeptide-95, Pentapeptide-63, sh-Polypeptide-6 and Nonapeptide-43. This fusion protein binds to Immunoglobulin E (IgE) and Interleukin-10 (IL-10) receptors; and it contains 433 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 amino acids.
inciName: SR-(OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-117 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-95 PENTAPEPTIDE-63 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-6 NONAPEPTIDE-43 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-6) DIMER

chemicalDescription: Polygonum Multiflorum Sprout Extract is the extract of the sprouts of Polygonum multiflorum, Polygonaceae.
Momordica Charantia Leaf Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground leaves of Momordica charantia, Cucurbitaceae.

sh-Polypeptide-75 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in Saccharomyces. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Kallikrein-8 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 260 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

sh-Polypeptide-76 is a synthetic peptide chemically produced to be identical to the human protein or piece of human protein, Transforming Growth Factor Beta-2. It contains a maximum of 414 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Silene Uniflora Flower/Leaf Extract is the extract of the flowers and leaves of Silene uniflora.
Damnacanthus Major Phytoplacenta Extract is the extract of the phytoplacenta cells directly isolated from Damnacanthus major or grown in culture, Rubiaceae.

chemicalDescription: Persicaria Thunbergii Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Persicaria thunbergii, Polygonaceae.
Peucedanum Japonicum Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of Peucedanum japonicum.
Annona Squamosa Fruit Extract is the extract of fruit of Annona squamosa, Annonaceae.
Cetearamidoethyldiethonium Succinoyl Hydrolyzed Collagen is the quaternary ammonium salt formed by the reaction of cetearamidoethyl diethylamine and succinoyl hydrolyzed collagen.
Oligopeptide-114 Acetate is the acetate salt of Oligopeptide-114.
Caesalpinia Benthamiana Root Extract is the extract of the roots of Caesalpinia benthamiana; Fabaceae.
Styrax Japonicus Branch/Fruit/Leaf Extract is the extract of the branches, fruit and leaves of Styrax japonicus, Styracaceae.
Ozonized Argan Oil is the product obtained by the controlled treatment of Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil with ozone, Sapotaceae.
Abrus Fruticulosus Root Extract is the extract of the roots of Abrus fructiculosus, Fabaceae.

chemicalDescription: Kluyveromyces/Lactobacillus/Sapindus Mukorossi Fruit Oil Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the oil derived from the fruit of Sapindus mukurossi by the microorganisms, Kluveromyces and Lactobacillus.
inciName: KLUYVEROMYCES/LACTOBACILLUS/SAPINDUS MUKOROSSI FRUIT OIL FERMENT FILTRATE

Argan Oil Isostearyl Esters is the product obtained by the transesterification of Isostearyl Alcohol and Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil.
Arthrospira Platensis Extract is the extract of the alga, Arthrospira platensis grown in culture, Phormidiaceae.
Nelumbo Nucifera Phytoplacenta Extract is the extract of the phytoplacenta cells isolated from the plant, Nelumbo nucifera or grown in culture, Nelumbonaceae.
Pouteria Lucuma Pulp Extract is the extract of the pulp of Pouteria lucuma, Sapotaceae.
Carpopeltis Affinis Extract is the extract of the alga, Carpopeltis affinis.
Gephyrocapsa Oceanica Extract is the extract of the alga, Gephyrocapsa oceanica,  Noelaerhabdaceae.
Butyl Hydroxybutyrate is the organic compound
Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Meristem Cell Culture is a suspension of the cultured meristem cells of Mentha piperita.
Sophora Japonica Flower Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground flowers of Sophora japonica, Fabaceae.
Hydrolyzed Polygonum Multiflorum Root Extract is the hydrolysate of Polygonum Multiflorum Root Extract derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Polygonaceae.
Hydrolyzed Soybean Callus Extract is the hydrolysate of an extract of the callus of the soybean, Glycine max grown in culture.
Bis-Dihydroxycinnamido Propane is the organic compound.
Hydrolyzed Pyrus Malus (Apple) Pectin Extract is the hydrolysate of Pyrus Malus (Apple) Pectin Extract derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Rosaceae.
Defatted Narcissus Tazetta Flower is the dried, defatted flowers of Narcissus tazetta, Liliaceae.

Distearmonium/Diethonium Chloride PG-Dimethicone is a quaternized siloxane polymer that is formed by the reaction of Glycidoxy Dimethicone, distearylmethylamine, and diethylmethylamine

Boehmeria Nivea Root Extract is the extract of the roots of Boehmeria nivea, Urticaceae.
Oxodeoxy Guanosine is the organic compound.
